properties.entry: SELECT Membership.individualId FROM Membership WHERE Membership.individualSegmentId = :individualSegmentId AND Membership.status = :status GROUP BY Membership.individualId ORDER BY COUNT(Membership.individualId) DESC, Membership.individualId ASC

SELECT Membership.individualSegmentId FROM Membership WHERE Membership.individualId = :individualId AND Membership.status = :status GROUP BY Membership.individualSegmentId ORDER BY Membership.individualSegmentId ASC

SELECT Membership.individualSegmentId FROM Membership WHERE Membership.individualId IN (:individualIds) AND Membership.status = :status GROUP BY Membership.individualSegmentId ORDER BY COUNT(Membership.individualSegmentId) DESC, Membership.individualSegmentId ASC

SELECT Membership.individualSegmentId FROM Membership WHERE Membership.individualId = :individualId GROUP BY Membership.individualSegmentId ORDER BY COUNT(Membership.individualSegmentId) DESC, Membership.individualSegmentId ASC LIMIT 20
